name: Financial Risk Intelligence
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: Risk analysis engine — financial document interpretation, regulatory filing analysis, market signal correlation, risk narrative generation, scenario-based stress testing commentary, and executive risk briefing synthesis

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for trading-floor latency requirements

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Financial knowledge retrieval — semantic search over regulatory filings (SEC, ESMA), risk frameworks (Basel III, IFRS 9), market research, counterparty profiles, and historical incident databases for evidence-grounded risk assessments

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Risk intelligence store — risk assessments, counterparty profiles, exposure calculations, alert history, scenario results, regulatory compliance records, and real-time position snapshots with sub-10ms reads

prod.note: Multi-partition, 200GB, change feed for downstream alerts

enterprise.note: Multi-region, 1TB, guaranteed low-latency for trading systems

services.name: Azure Event Hubs
services.purpose: Market data ingestion — real-time price feeds, trade execution events, order book updates, news wire alerts, regulatory announcement streams, and counterparty credit event notifications

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Risk processing pipeline — market event processing, exposure recalculation triggers, threshold breach alerting, risk report generation scheduling, and regulatory submission orchestration

services.name: Azure Stream Analytics
services.purpose: Real-time risk aggregation — windowed exposure calculations, VaR streaming updates, position concentration monitoring, liquidity threshold detection, and cross-portfolio correlation analysis

enterprise.note: 24 streaming units, real-time VaR, cross-portfolio analysis

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Market data feed credentials, trading system API keys, Cosmos DB keys, OpenAI keys, regulatory submission certificates, and encryption keys for financial data at rest

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Risk platform observability — risk calculation latency, alert delivery SLA, model accuracy tracking, market data feed health, regulatory submission status, and system throughput metrics

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine risk summaries and position reports, reserving GPT-4o for complex scenario analysis and regulatory interpretation — reduces AI costs by 50% while maintaining quality for critical analysis
Cache regulatory framework lookups by document ID and section — Basel III and IFRS 9 guidelines change quarterly at most, so a 7-day cache eliminates redundant AI Search queries
Use Stream Analytics for real-time VaR aggregation and trigger OpenAI analysis only when risk thresholds are breached — avoids continuous AI inference costs for normal market conditions

Implement tiered alert processing: critical risk breaches get immediate AI analysis, medium-risk alerts batched every 15 minutes, low-risk events summarized daily — reduces AI token consumption by 70%
Use Event Hubs capture to Blob Storage for market data archival — cheaper than maintaining high TU counts for historical replay, and enables batch risk analytics offline
Partition Cosmos DB by counterparty and time window — enables efficient exposure queries without cross-partition fan-out, reducing RU consumption for the most common risk lookups
